name: Algorithms & Data Structures
goal: Understand and implement core CS algorithms and data structures
units: Unit 1: Complexity Analysis - Big O, time vs space, best/worst/average
Unit 2: Arrays and Strings - two-pointer, sliding window, in-place ops
Unit 3: Linked Lists - singly, doubly, reversal, cycle detection
Unit 4: Stacks and Queues - implementation, monotonic stack, BFS/DFS
Unit 5: Hash Tables - hashing, collision handling, common patterns
Unit 6: Trees - BST, traversals, height, LCA, balanced trees
Unit 7: Sorting - bubble, merge, quick, heap sort; stability
Unit 8: Recursion and Backtracking - base case, call stack, pruning
Unit 9: Dynamic Programming - memoization, tabulation, common patterns
Unit 10: Graphs - adjacency list/matrix, BFS, DFS, Dijkstra
